speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Yeh phenka hua tractor tyre dikh raha hai? Isme har mahine ke 60,000 rupaye chhupe hain.
motion_prompt: Extreme close-up in a kabaad yard, a weathered hand flips a dusty tractor tyre upright, dust puffs into sunlight; snap push-in to the tyre's hollow dark centre. Harsh daylight. No face.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Log mujhe kabaadi bolte the — kachra bech ke kya karega zindagi bhar?
motion_prompt: Protagonist (~30, kurta and gamchha, tier-3 look) to camera with a half-smile, tyre at his feet; a half-second flash of neighbours at a chai stall smirking as he hauls tyres past.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Par hisaab suno. Ek scrap tyre — sirf 120 rupaye ka. Thodi mehnat, sau keelein, aur ban jaata hai pashuon ka naand — jo bikta hai 600 se 1,000 rupaye mein.
motion_prompt: Hands hammer a ring of nails around the tyre rim; cut to the trough taking shape; cut to the finished naand with water splashed in and a buffalo drinking; slow tilt up the gleaming wet naand.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Din ke paanch banao, mahine ke dedh sau. Har gaon mein, har baade mein iski zaroorat hai — khud jod lo.
motion_prompt: Wide of a row of five finished naands; he sets the fifth in line and wipes his hands, then turns straight to camera, one eyebrow up.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Socha, shuru karun, par kahan se? Machine? Maal? YouTube khola, aur bas, yahi galti ho gayi. Aadhi-adhuri videos, na process samajh aaya, na mandi ka raasta.
motion_prompt: Room at night lit only by phone glow; he scrolls restlessly, jaw tight; quick push-in, he tosses the phone onto the cot and rubs his eyes.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Phir Seekho app mila. Business Ideas category mein A se Z poora process — scrap sasta kahan milega, kaise banana hai, kahan bechna hai. Koi badi-badi baatein nahi, aur shuruaat? Sirf 1 rupaye ke trial se.
motion_prompt: Insert: a hand holding a phone filling the frame, bright blank screen (app UI composited in post); his thumb hovers, then taps.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Pehla naand banaya — padosi ke baade ke liye. 600 rupaye. Haath mein pehli kamai — apne khud ke kaam ki.
motion_prompt: He passes the first naand over a low fence to a neighbour, cattle stir behind; insert of notes pressed into his palm, his fist closing slowly. Golden hour.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Aaj teen mahine baad — Dundaraka mandi mein apni jagah hai, mahine ke 60 se 70 hazaar. Maa ke liye pehli baar gehne liye. Ab log kabaadi nahi, kaarigar bolte hain.
motion_prompt: His mandi stall, naands stacked, two buyers inspecting; cut to mother at a doorway touching new earrings, smiling; back at the stall he straightens, chin lifts.

speaker: RAJU
vo_line: Tumhare aas-paas bhi kabaad pada hai — usme business chhupa hai. To install button par click karo aur Seekho app download karo.
motion_prompt: He stands arms crossed, confident, slight smile; stall activity continues behind; slow push-in; a single nod to camera. Install-button UI added in post.
